data.body: LANDED + CLOSED-OUT. Close-out change 410 (RC1 resurrection test, RC2b .bak-restart test, fsck resurrection-repair edge fix, doc GC link) MERGED. CLOSED w/ completion signatures: A1 b306, A2 36d1, C4 943f, C1 a713, C3 acd0 (5 children). RE-ASSESSMENT of remaining 6: A3 34b1 (tooling landed; verifier needs 4 tests [push-fail abort, crash-before-marker, MISSING_CREATE fixture, pause/resume] + 'no in-flight pass' check + LIVE remediation run w/ recorded counts); C2 c244 (root-caused, unimplemented deep re-create); B1 a118 (open, live shadow+heal); D1 d01e (open, live matrix); NEW 9622 (reconciler safety machinery, no plan-review); NEW eca4 (_load->package imports, no plan-review). Epic ace2 still in_progress w/ 6 open children. Gerrit changes merged: 389 390 407 408 409 410.
